title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents a tutorial on building long-running AI agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK), an open source framework for stateless, event-driven systems. The tutorial demonstrates the long-running agent pattern with multi-agent delegation through a coordinator agent that distributes specialized tasks to sub-agents while maintaining a clean reasoning chain.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building long-running AI agents with the Agent Development Kit (ADK), an open source framework for stateless, event-driven systems. The tutorial demonstrates the long-running agent pattern using multi-agent delegation: a coordinator agent distributes specialized tasks to sub-agents while preserving a clean reasoning chain. The framing matters for developers structuring agents that persist across events rather than holding state internally, since the coordinator-to-sub-agent split separates orchestration from specialized work.
